event: View of the Remains of the Temple of Peace (Basilica of Maxentius), Rome
symbols: massive ruined arches — the transience of worldly empires, even the mightiest
tiny figures amid the ruins — human smallness before the monuments of history
coffered vaults still standing — the enduring traces of human ambition
description: A large, detailed engraving showing the massive ruins of a Roman basilica. Three enormous arched vaults with elaborate coffered ceilings dominate the composition, partially collapsed but still towering. Smaller ruined structures, walls, and fragments of masonry surround the base. Tiny human figures and a cart provide scale, emphasizing the colossal size of the ancient structure. The sky is dramatic with billowing clouds. An inscription at the bottom reads 'VEDUTA DEGLI AVANZI DEL TEMPIO DELLA PACE.' The linework is precise and detailed.
